sector-radius.description: The single default sector radius (× SectorScale) for any sector that omits its own radius. One shared default for every sector (no per-sector-id defaults). 0/omitted -> the sim's World.DefaultSectorRadius fallback; a map may override via its top-level `sector-radius`.

asteroid-density.description: Asteroids per unit of normalized sector volume.

debug-freeze-brain.description: Skip the per-drone AI decision loop (benchmarking).

debug-no-fire.description: Force every ship's firing input false (benchmarking).

fog-of-war.description: Per-server fog-of-war toggle. Null/omitted -> on at projection (default true); when off, behavior/bytes are identical to no-fog. Rides the wire (WorldConfig.FogOfWar).

fog-eyeball-multiplier.description: Outer "eyeball" tier multiplier on a ship's vision-sphere radius (mesh streams but isn't radar-detected). 0/omitted -> 1.5 at projection. Server-side only — does NOT ride the wire.

fire-signature-boost.description: Radar-signature multiplier applied to a ship the instant it fires (guns or missiles), decaying linearly back to 1x over FireSignatureWindow. 0/omitted -> 2.5 at projection; author 1.0 to disable. Server-side only — does NOT ride the wire.

fire-signature-window.description: Seconds after the last shot over which FireSignatureBoost decays back to 1x. 0/omitted -> 4.0 at projection. Server-side only — does NOT ride the wire.

boost-signature-mult.description: Radar-signature multiplier at full afterburner, ramped by the ship's live AbPower (0..1). Null/omitted -> 1.0 (neutral). Server-side only — does NOT ride the wire.

shield-signature-mult.description: Radar-signature multiplier while a hull has an EQUIPPED shield (ShieldCapacity > 0), regardless of the current pool. Null/omitted -> 1.0 (neutral). Server-side only.

dust-signature-mult.description: Radar-signature multiplier inside a dust cloud, scaled by local density (<1 = hiding in dust makes a ship quieter; stacks with the sightline attenuation). Null/omitted -> 1.0 (neutral). Server-side only.

signature-min-mult.description: Clamp rails on the composed signature: the effective value never leaves [(base+bias)×min, (base+bias)×max]. Null/omitted -> 0.1 / 8.0. Server-side only.

signature-max-mult.description: Clamp rails on the composed signature: the effective value never leaves [(base+bias)×min, (base+bias)×max]. Null/omitted -> 0.1 / 8.0. Server-side only.

fog-ghost-timeout.description: Seconds a lost-contact ship ghost lingers before expiring on its own (re-scout / radar re-detection still clear it earlier; an eyeball glimpse re-stamps it). 0/omitted -> 120 at projection. Server-side only — does NOT ride the wire.

aleph-radar-signature.description: Radar signature of a warp gate (aleph) for fog-of-war discovery. Null/omitted -> 1.4 at projection. Server-side only — never streamed.

rock-radar-signature.description: Radar signature of an asteroid for fog-of-war discovery. Null/omitted -> 2.0 at projection. Server-side only — never streamed.

brain-hz.description: AI decisions per second (steering still re-runs every sim tick).

max-pigs-per-team.description: Maximum number of PIG drones alive per team at once.

squad-delay-seconds.description: Seconds after a squad wipe before the next squad launches.

patrol-reach-frac.description: Patrol waypoints stay within this fraction of the sector radius.

patrol-arrive.description: Re-roll a patrol waypoint once within this distance of it.

radar-range.description: Detection range at which a pig acquires targets, world units.

fire-range.description: Maximum distance at which a pig opens fire, world units.

standoff.description: Preferred stand-off distance from a bombing target, world units.

aim-deg.description: Half-angle aim cone (degrees) inside which a pig opens fire.

turn-gain.description: Baseline steering turn-rate gain, before the per-slot aiming-skill spread.

avoid-lookahead.description: Lookahead distance used by obstacle-avoidance steering, world units.

avoid-margin.description: Extra clearance margin kept around obstacles during avoidance, world units.

threat-aim-weight.description: Weight on aim-cone alignment in the target-priority threat score.

threat-close-weight.description: Weight on proximity in the target-priority threat score.

threat-dmg-weight.description: Weight on incoming damage dealt in the target-priority threat score.

threat-switch-margin.description: Score margin a new target must beat the current one by before a pig switches.

threat-base-weight.description: Weight on threat to the home base in the target-priority threat score.

base-threat-radius.description: Radius around the base within which an enemy counts as threatening it, world units.

threat-bomber-bonus.description: Extra threat score added for Bomber-class enemies.

wander-period-seconds.description: Seconds before a pig re-rolls its wander sector.

bomber-respawn-seconds.description: Cooldown before a team's bomber relaunches, seconds.

turn-gain-min.description: Minimum per-pig turn-rate gain in the aiming-skill spread.

turn-gain-max.description: Maximum per-pig turn-rate gain in the aiming-skill spread.

lead-frac-min.description: Minimum fraction of full firing-solution lead a pig applies, in the aiming-skill spread.

lead-frac-max.description: Maximum fraction of full firing-solution lead a pig applies, in the aiming-skill spread.

aim-wobble-rate.description: Rate at which the aim-wobble oscillates.

missile-hold-seconds.description: Extra spacing between a pig's missile launches (on top of the rack), seconds.

juke-range.description: Enemy distance within which a pig starts evasive juking, world units.

dock-standoff.description: Standoff-point distance outside a docking door's plane, world units.

dock-clearance.description: Detour ring radius past BaseRadius when routing around the base to a far-side door.

dock-creep-throttle.description: Throttle fraction while creeping down the docking corridor.

ai.description: PIG drone AI tuning (server-side only — never streamed). Null -> stock values.

collision-damage-scale.description: Damage scale for ship collisions with static geometry (asteroids, bases).

max-collision-damage.description: Maximum damage a single collision can deal, capped regardless of closing speed.

collision-damage-min-speed.description: Below this closing speed a collision is a harmless kiss (bounce, no damage).

boundary-base-dps.description: Base damage-per-second applied to a ship outside the sector boundary.

boundary-ramp-dps.description: Additional damage-per-second added per world unit beyond the sector boundary.

boundary-max-dps.description: Maximum damage-per-second the boundary erosion can ever deal.

combat.description: Collision-damage / boundary-hazard tuning (server-side only). Null -> stock.

aleph-trigger-radius.description: Distance from a gate mouth at which a ship warps.

warp-exit-offset.description: How far beyond the destination mouth a warping ship exits.

warp-exit-jitter.description: Per-axis random spread on the warp-exit cone.

paycheck-seconds.description: Seconds between flat per-team credit paychecks.

dock-radius-frac.description: Dock when within this fraction of your OWN base radius.

launch-speed.description: Catapult speed out of the docking-exit hardpoint on spawn, u/s.

rescue-radius-mult.description: Pod pickup distance as a multiple of the ship collision radius.

reconnect-grace-seconds.description: Seconds a dropped client's ship is held for reconnect reclaim.

ended-to-lobby-seconds.description: Seconds after match end before the server returns to the lobby.

field-fill-frac.description: Field disc radius as a fraction of the sector radius.

field-flatten.description: Field disc half-thickness as a fraction of its radius (shallow).

field-area-density.description: Field rocks per unit² of disc footprint (at asteroid-density 1).

field-rock-min.description: Minimum size of a field asteroid, world units.

field-rock-max.description: Maximum size of a field asteroid, world units.

belt-area-density.description: Belt rocks per unit² of annulus (at asteroid-density 1).

belt-rock-min.description: Minimum size of a belt asteroid, world units.

belt-rock-max.description: Maximum size of a belt asteroid, world units.

rock-size-skew.description: Rock size power-law skew (> 1 biases toward the small end).

base-inner-frac.description: Inner radius of the garrison placement band, as a fraction of the sector radius.

base-outer-frac.description: Outer radius of the garrison placement band, as a fraction of the sector radius.

base-y-jitter.description: Vertical (Y-axis) random jitter applied to garrison placement, world units.

he3-per-sector.description: Guaranteed He3 rocks per ordinary sector (clamped to the sector's actual rock count). A map's per-sector he3-count override wins.

he3-per-home-sector.description: Guaranteed He3 rocks in a team's HOME sector (garrison sector); stamped by MapLoader onto garrison sectors that omit their own he3-count, so home fields stay leaner than contested space.

special-per-sector.description: Count of RARE special rocks (Carbonaceous/Silicon/Uranium) per sector; the rest are common Regolith.

home-special-chance.description: Chance (0..1) that a HOME (garrison) sector receives its special rocks at all; default 0 = home fields hold none. Deterministic per world seed; a map-authored per-sector special-count bypasses the roll.

special-rock-radius-mult.description: Radius multiplier for the rare special rocks (Carbonaceous/Silicon/Uranium); 1 = no change, 3 = oversized by 200%.

seeding.description: Map-seeding shape tuning: asteroid fields/belts + base placement. Null -> stock.

max-miners-per-team.description: Cap on live AI miners a team may field at once.

harvest-rate-per-second.description: Ore units a miner pulls from a rock per second.

credits-per-ore-unit.description: Team credits granted per ore unit offloaded at a base.

offload-delay-seconds.description: Dwell after an offload before the miner relaunches, seconds.

ore-capacity-min.description: Minimum per-He3-rock ore capacity, before the radius/richness scaling.

ore-capacity-max.description: Maximum per-He3-rock ore capacity, before the radius/richness scaling.

shrink-floor-frac.description: Fraction of its spawn radius a fully-mined rock shrinks toward (never below).

miner-standoff.description: Distance from a target rock's surface within which a miner harvests, world units.

retreat-health-frac.description: Hull fraction below which a miner abandons mining and returns to base (0 disables).

mining.description: Mining/ore economy tuning (server-side only — never streamed). Null -> stock.

max-constructors-per-base.description: Cap on live constructors a single garrison may build at once (no team-wide cap).

production-seconds.description: Garrison production dwell after purchase, before the drone launches, seconds.

approach-speed.description: Creep speed from the standoff shell to surface contact, world units/second.

sink-speed.description: Creep speed from surface contact to the embed depth, world units/second.

standoff.description: Extra reach past the rock surface where the travel leg "arrives" (the align shell), world units.

sink-depth-frac.description: How deep the drone embeds: fraction of the rock radius it descends below the surface.

sink-backstop-seconds.description: Backstop: force the build to start after this long in the Sinking phase, seconds.

constructor.description: Constructor/base-building tuning (server-side only — never streamed). Null -> stock.
